Maternal, Child and Adolescent Health
Prenatal Care Guidance Program (PCG) & Perinatal Outreach and Education
If you are pregnant or think you are pregnant, we are here to assist you in getting into early and regular prenatal care.
Services Provided
Prenatal appointments
Assistance with filling out Medi-Cal forms
Finding resources such as:
WIC
Transportation
Shelters
Family Planning
Other Health and Medical Services
Solano County residents who are pregnant may be eligible for this free program.
Contact 877-680-2229 if you are in need of prenatal care of have questions. ¡Se habla espanol!
The Prenatal Care Guidance Program is a partner to BabyFirst Solano. To view the BabyFirst Solano program information
click here
.
